stories.title: Round 2 NBA mock draft: Stacking the best availabl...
stories.summary: Who are the best players still on the board -- and where could they go? We project Round 2 picks.

stories.title: Wizards opt for BYU's Dybantsa with No. 1 pick
stories.summary: The Wizards ushered in a new era by drafting AJ Dybantsa with the first pick, selecting him over Kansas' Darryn Peterson to help turn around the franchise.

stories.title: Celtics' Stevens: Brown remains 'big part of us'
stories.summary: Amid reported trade talks for Jaylen Brown, Celtics president of basketball operations Brad Stevens said Tuesday night that the star forward remains "valued" by the organization.

stories.title: Bucks GM mum on Giannis, emphasizes 'building'
stories.summary: With the trade of superstar Giannis Antetokounmpo to the Heat not yet official, Bucks GM Jon Horst declined to talk specifics -- but repeatedly emphasized "a theme of building" after the team drafted Brayden Burries and Nate Ament on Tuesday night.
